title: Learning Management System (LMS)
description: Managed end-to-end testing by designing test cases and building automation scripts using Katalon Studio[cite: 2]. Maintained test cases alongside feature updates, tracked bugs via Google Sheets, and monitored real-time deployment status via Discord integration to accelerate developer collaboration[cite: 2].

title: Budget Management System (BMS)
description: Performed QA and integration testing by optimizing 80% of legacy test cases[cite: 2]. Executed manual and automated testing via Katalon Studio to validate core functionalities and ensure accurate data exchange with the client's Odoo platform[cite: 2].

title: Financial Order Management (FOM)
description: Executed functional and integration testing using manual and automated approaches with Katalon Studio[cite: 2]. Validated main transaction flows across modules to ensure accurate, non-redundant data transmission with the client's Odoo platform[cite: 2].

title: Human Resources Information System (HRIS)
description: Conducted intensive cross-platform testing for an integrated HR ecosystem[cite: 2]. Validated end-to-end business flow synchronization, ensuring mobile application requests like maternity leave and overtime synced perfectly with the web dashboard approval process[cite: 2].

title: Manufacturing Maintenance System (Web)
description: Executed functional testing on a web-based manufacturing application designed for managers and administrators to manage checklists and monitor operations. Validated core features including corrective actions and preventive maintenance scheduling while ensuring alignment with client requirements[cite: 2].

title: Manufacturing Maintenance System (Mobile)
description: Conducted functional testing on a mobile application tailored for on-site maintenance teams and technicians. Ensured the stability and usability of the application for executing machine repairs, updating task checklists, and reporting field issues in real-time[cite: 2].
